title: Mo's Double Jump
description: Allows you to jump more than once; perfect for breaking falls and crossing large gaps!
body:
_How does mom let you have TWO jumps?_

A simple Mixin patch that allows you to jump more than once. Isn't that pretty cool?

Additionally, this mod lets you configure it to be not just a double jump, but a multi-jump mod! (Configuration in-game may require another mod to enable configs in-game)
